subject: Fwd: Cavett's guilt and horror..
body:
Dear Lesley,

HORRORS!

I have committed the (to me) unpardonable error of inflicting upon Jeffrie -- today on the phone - a false anagram. Please spare him the pain of passing it on in its erroneous form.

Here is the correct version:

The letters in PRESIDENT TRUMP -- re-arranged -- spell: MR. PUTIN'S RED PET.

Thanks, Lesley. The chicken matter touches my heart. Dick C.
body_html:
